series_metadata.series_description: File contains application, ordinances/resolutions, and resume of local board of appeal members, and certification information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for two years after records become inactive, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy records. ; Microform: Retain diazo copy in operating area for 10 years and master microfilm in off site storage for ten years then destroy. State Archives to review microfilm prior to disposition., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
